sources.title: Komm Nur, Mein Liebstes Vögelein 1968
sources.description: Another pseudo documentary on sex through the ages. It features a fair bit of archive footage and ends with a Terry Gilliam style of animation. Probably most notable for being Sybil Danning's first movie appearance.  Unfortunately the resolution of this copy is really low and I was unable to pick her out. Presumably she is one of the many naked background bodies.  German with optional English subtitles

metadata.Plot: The story presents an entertaining as well as revealing portrayal of the moral history of sex in the course of human history.
metadata.Writer: Joachim Fernau, Manfred Purzer, Rolf Thiele
metadata.Actors: Maria Raber, Peter Hohberger, Tanja Gruber
